name: claude-code-teams-bot
description: Microsoft Teams bot that bridges to Claude Code

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n bot,tunnel -c blue,green "tsx watch src/index.ts" "node scripts/tunnel.mjs"
scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
